events.title: Chinatown and Bay Village Coffee Hour
events.description: Event Date: Mon, 05/18/2026 - 10:30am - Mon, 05/18/2026 - 11:30am Address: Elliot Norton Park 295 Tremont Street Boston , MA 02116 United States Join Mayor Michelle Wu and City Staff for coffee and conversation! Mayor Wu’s Neighborhood Coffee Hours offer a unique opportunity to speak directly with the Mayor and staff from City departments about City services

events.title: , Stone Zoo
events.description: Round up your crew for a flavor-packed night of food, drinks and wild fun. Franklin Park Zoo 10:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. Step into the Aussie Aviary to watch hundreds of colorful budgies fly freely—and even feed them by hand if one lands nearby. Weather permitting
